title: ASR Outdoor Gemstone Paydirt Bag Gold Panning Kit (Many Styles and Sizes)
description:
Learn how to pan for gold with this six piece ASR Outdoor gold pan kit for beginners. This exciting new prospecting starter gold panning kit includes engineered gold paydirt by professional prospector Bobby Bo. With this kit, you'll be able to learn and practice gold panning techniques at home without having to travel to a claim site. The ASR Outdoor six piece gold panning kit is an excellent option for kids and beginners who are just getting started in gold prospecting. Inside the kit, we’ve included six essential prospecting equipment tools to learn the basics of gold panning. You'll find a 10" dual riffle gold pan that will help you start identifying and collecting gold

ASR Outdoor Gemstone Paydirt Bag Gold Panning Kit (Many Styles and Sizes)

Discover the excitement of gemstone prospecting with the ASR Outdoor Authentic Gemstone Paydirt! Each bag is filled with high-quality, raw gemstones. This carefully curated material provides an exciting and rewarding panning or sifting experience, perfect for both beginners and seasoned hobbyists alike.

Key Features

  • AUTHENTIC GEMSTONES - This bag of paydirt comes with high-quality gemstones, authentically sourced
  • DIVERSE PAYDIRT EXPERIENCE - This bag of gemstones provides a fun and rewarding gold panning or sifting experience; Discover, clean, and polish your very own gemstones out in the field!
  • IDEAL FOR HOBBYISTS - Gemstone paydirt bags are perfect for rockhounds and gold prospectors, beginner to expert-level, and everything in between with the potential to uncover rare gemstones while learning about and studying geology.
  • EXCITING DISCOVERY - Each bag is unique, offering the chance to find beautiful, one-of-a-kind stones and other hidden gems; Makes a great gift idea for your favorite gold prospector, geologist, or gemstone collector.
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: Assorted; Bag size: 1lb, 3lb or 5lb; Individual gem weight: Assorted; Sourced from: Assorted Locations; 100% authentic minerals

Product Specifications

  • MPN: GEMPARENT

Whether you’re just starting out or you’re a seasoned prospector, this gemstone paydirt bag offers the perfect way to learn about geology, gemstone identification, and discover hidden gems. The 1lb bag contains a unique mix of gemstones, making each experience one-of-a-kind. With every sift, you’ll have the chance to uncover beautiful, rare gemstones, turning every discovery into an exciting moment!

This paydirt is ideal for rockhounds, gold prospectors, and gemstone collectors, making it a great gift for anyone who enjoys the thrill of the find. Whether for yourself or a loved one, this bag offers endless fun and the potential for a valuable and rewarding discovery.
